query: SELECT ugp.rota, ugp.can_view FROM user_group_permissions ugp JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.id = ugp.group_id WHERE ug.nome = 'TST' ORDER BY ugp.rota;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT ugp.rota, ugp.can_view FROM user_group_permissions ugp JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.id = ugp.group_id WHERE ug.nome = 'TST' ORDER BY ugp.rota;
